testcase.name: test_deliveries_endpoint
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_konekt_batch1_fixes_v336.py:248: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please try again later."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
